name: Swing the Vote
text:
Cast this spell only when the table is voting or a player is choosing among options for a spell or ability they control.
Change one vote or chosen option to the option you prefer. (You worked the room. Hands were shaken. It's done.)
flavorText: Whether the rival's coin is heads or tails, Petunia would just like to register a friendly correction.

extras.voting: change a vote or chosen option
